label: t:settings_schema.age_gate.description.label
default: Please enter your date of birth for full access.

label: Cart icon count
info: Applies to the cart count icon once items are added.
To add a language, go to your [language settings.](/admin/settings/languages)
To add a country, go to your [payment settings.](/admin/settings/payments)

label: Drop-down style
info: Does not apply to vertical header.

label: Drop-down position
info: Only applies to vertical drop-down style.

label: Vertical spacing
info: Controls the amount of space between each drop-down menu item.

label: Use placeholders
info: Display form label inside form field.

label: Toggle sidebar content
info: Content below sidebar headings will be hidden by default.

label: Enable styled tables
info: This will add borders and padding to your tables.

label: Text alignment
info: Does not apply if 'Show product information on hover' is enabled.

label: Position
info: Applies to stickers on product thumbnails

label: Show color swatches
info: [Learn more](https://help.outofthesandbox.com/hc/en-us/articles/360024080613) or manage your custom color swatches for all products by [viewing your uploaded files](/admin/settings/files).

label: Inventory remaining threshold
info: Inventory remaining text will be displayed below this value

label: Sold out options
info: Variants set to continue selling when out of stock will always be selectable.

label: Show color swatches
info: [Learn more](https://help.outofthesandbox.com/hc/en-us/articles/360024080613) or manage your custom color swatches for all products by [viewing your uploaded files](/admin/settings/files).

label: Text
default: Notify me when this product is available:

label: Display style
info: Display styles do not apply to 'Search focus' header style on desktop. Overlay style does not apply to 'Vertical' header style.

label: Menu
info: This menu won't show dropdown items.

label: Show lock icon on checkout button
Show 'agree to terms' checkbox
info: If the dynamic payment button is enabled, customers will be able to bypass these terms. [Learn more](https://help.outofthesandbox.com/hc/en-us/articles/115.1.001208-Terms-Conditions-on-the-Cart-Page)

label: Checkout
info: Proceed to checkout from the cart.

label: Shipping rates calculator default country selection
